tokensPerSolvedTask: sum(provider_reported_input_tokens + provider_reported_output_tokens for every attempt) / count(solved tasks)
wallTimePerSolvedTask: sum(measured_wall_milliseconds for every attempt) / count(solved tasks)
toolRoundTripsPerSolvedTask: sum(tool_round_trips for every attempt) / count(solved tasks)
comparison: report candidate-baseline absolute values and ratios per task family; never merge v1 and v2 populations
